title: fleischmannia ferreyrae
intro: Fleischmannia ferreyrae is a plant species native to Peru, belonging to the Asteraceae family and commonly known as Peruvian fleabane or fleabane. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. Fleischmannia ferreyrae is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its herbal preparations have been used in traditional medicine for centuries.
